evidence_summary: Phase 6 controlled expansion achieved across three bounded commits (9fc41af through 95bb7db). qualify-v3: --fail-on-incomplete-v8-gates in level10_qualify.py exits 1 when v8_gate_assertions.all_ready is False; --strict-v8-gates in level10_promote.py passes the flag through to qualification on every promote invocation. qualify-v4: benchmark8_ready and attribution8_ready gates in evaluate_v8_gates; summarize_benchmark reads {"classes":{"name":{"passed":bool}}} format; summarize_attribution reads {"orchestration_delta","model_delta"} format; qualify_v4_artifact_builder.py classifies stage3_manager traces by target directory, computes acceptance-rate per class and attribution deltas, writes committed artifacts. benchmark8_ready=True and attribution8_ready=True confirmed at 95bb7db. 57 tests passing in packet validation.
